source_pr.title: ddl:Revert "ddl: speed up ddl test"
source_pr.body:
Reverts pingcap/tidb#14639
Since high concurrency would leads to unstable  (randomly failed) tests ,revert this PR.
See our "CI failed dashboard" today:
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/5809588/73927766-f4940d00-490c-11ea-8735-ae9c0613709f.png)
And the unit test results of MASTER:
https://internal.pingcap.net/idc-jenkins/blue/organizations/jenkins/unit_test_tidb_master/activity

symptoms: PR body: "high concurrency would leads to unstable (randomly failed) tests" and explicitly reverts #14639.
failure_signature: PR body: "high concurrency would leads to unstable (randomly failed) tests" and explicitly reverts #14639.

evidence: evidence: PR body: "high concurrency would leads to unstable (randomly failed) tests" and explicitly reverts #14639.
evidence: diff reverts ddl test suite re-distribution changes (ddl/db_partition_test.go, ddl/db_test.go).
